scripts.bundle:tar: powershell -Command "$VER = (Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json).version; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp; Copy-Item src-tauri/target/release/frontend.exe src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp/frontend.exe; Copy-Item ../java/target/parking.jar src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp/; Set-Location src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp; tar -czf ../frontend-$VER`__amd64.tar.gz frontend.exe parking.jar; Set-Location ..; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force tar_tmp; Write-Output 'Created: frontend-'$VER'_amd64.tar.gz'"
